context: Tests whether the agent implements the documented 5-step cost projection in transactions-not-bytes terms, with subscribe = publish × fan-out, function invocations per publish, and a per-category limit check.

checklist.name: publish formula
checklist.description: publish category equals dau * publishesPerUserPerSession * daysPerMonth (with daysPerMonth defaulting to 30 when omitted)

checklist.name: subscribe = publish × fan-out
checklist.description: subscribe category equals publish multiplied by avgFanOutPerPublish (NOT dau × fanOut directly)

checklist.name: signal formula
checklist.description: signal category equals dau * signalsPerUserPerSession * daysPerMonth

checklist.name: fire formula
checklist.description: fire category equals dau * firesPerUserPerSession * daysPerMonth

checklist.name: history formula
checklist.description: history category equals dau * historyReadsPerUserPerSession * daysPerMonth

checklist.name: appContext formula
checklist.description: appContext category equals dau * appContextOpsPerUserPerSession * daysPerMonth

checklist.name: functions = publish × invocationsPerPublish
checklist.description: functions category equals publish multiplied by functionInvocationsPerPublish (per-publish fan-out, not per-user)

checklist.name: total is sum of categories
checklist.description: total equals the sum of all category values returned

checklist.name: dominantCategory is argmax
checklist.description: dominantCategory is the key in categories whose value is the maximum

checklist.name: exceeded list per-category
checklist.description: exceeded contains the names of all categories whose value exceeds the corresponding planLimits entry (when that planLimits entry is provided)

checklist.name: exceeded includes 'total'
checklist.description: exceeded includes the string 'total' precisely when planLimits.total is provided and total exceeds it

checklist.name: Comment on transactions-not-bytes
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly says PubNub bills by transactions (not bytes) AND that fan-out × publish rate is the dominant cost driver

checklist.name: daysPerMonth default 30
checklist.description: When inputs.daysPerMonth is undefined, the function defaults to 30
